topics.name: regulatory mapping
topics.description: Mapping applicable laws, regulations, and standards to the organization's controls and policies.

topics.name: obligation management
topics.description: Tracking specific compliance obligations derived from applicable regulations through to fulfillment.

topics.name: compliance monitoring
topics.description: Ongoing monitoring activities that confirm obligations continue to be met over time.

topics.name: evidence management
topics.description: Collecting, organizing, and retaining evidence that demonstrates compliance and control operation.

topics.name: control testing
topics.description: Testing controls to confirm they are designed appropriately and operating effectively.
